name: tokenmaxxing-ai
description: Token-efficient AI coding-agent workflows for simplifying code and reviewing repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Simplify and review code with approval-first workflows.
interface.longDescription: Tokenmaxxing AI provides portable coding-agent workflows for finding over-engineered code, reviewing codebases with lite/mid/ultra effort, asking for approval before edits, and verifying changes after implementation.
defaultPrompt: Use tokenmaxxing-ai:review ultra for this repo.
